name: Unstuffed Mushroom Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Bacon (finely crumbled) or Imitation Bacon Bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the mushrooms.
2. Combine the diced mushrooms, shredded cheese, and bacon in a bowl.
3. Stir in the sour cream until well blended.
4. Add the Worcestershire sauce and hot sauce to taste.
5. Spoon the mixture into a 1-quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle seasoned bread crumbs evenly over the top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
8. Serve hot with dippers such as tomatoes, bell peppers, chili peppers, and bread sticks.
